page_metadata.biotools__summary: A Ruby binding to the SAMtools library.Bio-samtools is a flexible and easy to use interface that programmers of many levels of experience can use to access information in the popular and common SAM/BAM format.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A Ruby binding to the SAMtools library.Bio-samtools is a flexible and easy to use interface that programmers of many levels of experience can use to access information in the popular and common SAM/BAM format.
